# Comparison And Predicates → Compare and Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Comparison And Predicates → Compare and Subtract

Compare and Subtract

Instruction Type and Width               Instruction description
                                         Performs two comparison operations. Each operation compares
                                         between two sources and subtracts sources in case condition is
Vector Compare and Subtract Word Parts   met. The sources are 16-bit wide. The destination is 16 or 20-bit
                                         wide and are packed into either 32-bit ot 40-bit respectively,
                                         depending on the register type.
